item.title: GPT-5.5 正式发布：更聪明、更省 token
item.guid: GPT-5.5-正式发布：更聪明、更省-token
item.description:
Early this morning, OpenAI officially released its strongest flagship models, GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro. Their core capability is to accept messy, multi-step complex tasks and complete them autonomously — planning paths, calling tools, verifying results, and continuously advancing, without requiring step-by-step user intervention. 今天凌晨，OpenAI 正式发布旗下最强旗舰模型 GPT-5.5 及 GPT-5.5 Pro，核心能力是接受杂乱、多步骤的复杂任务并自主完成 —— 规划路径、调用工具、校验结果、持续推进，无需用户逐步干预。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, GPT-5.5 released! Claude Code cured its "intelligence reduction" overnight, and "Altman collapsed" gets a sequel 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，GPT-5.5 发布！Claude Code 连夜治好降智，「奥特曼瘫倒」喜提续集

    Terminal-Bench 2.0 scored 82.7% (GPT-5.4 was 75.1%), SWE-Bench Pro reached 58.6%, internal long-task evaluation Expert-SWE reached 73.1%, and all three tests were completed with fewer tokens;

    GDPval achieved an 84.9% win or draw rate across 44 professional evaluations, Tau2-bench Telecom customer service workflow reached 98.0% (GPT-5.4 was 92.8%), and OSWorld computer operations reached 78.7%;

    BixBench bioinformatics evaluation scored 80.5%, ranking first among published score models; an internal version also proved a long-standing conjecture about Ramsey numbers and completed formal verification in Lean;

    Jointly designed with Nvidia GB200/GB300 NVL72 systems, per-token latency is on par with GPT-5.4, while token generation speed is increased by over 20% through load balancing optimization; for the same Codex tasks, GPT-5.5 consumes significantly fewer tokens .

Michael Truell, co-founder and CEO of Cursor, stated that GPT-5.5 "can persist longer without stopping midway when facing complex long-term tasks"; Dan Shipper, founder and CEO of Every, verified that it can independently provide system refactoring solutions identical to those of senior engineers; Cursor 联合创始人兼 CEO Michael Truell 表示，GPT-5.5「面对复杂长期任务时能坚持更久而不中途停下」；Every 创始人兼 CEO Dan Shipper 验证了其能独立给出与资深工程师相同的系统重构方案；

An Nvidia engineer even stated that "losing access feels like having a limb amputated." 一位英伟达工程师甚至表示「失去访问权限感觉就像肢体被截肢了一样」。

GPT-5.5 is now available to ChatGPT Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise users, with Codex supporting up to a 400K context window; the API version will also be launched soon, with standard pricing at $5 per million input tokens and $30 per million output tokens; GPT-5.5 Pro API pricing will be $30 and $180 respectively. GPT-5.5 已向 ChatGPT Plus、Pro、Business 和 Enterprise 用户开放，Codex 支持最高 400K 上下文窗口；API 版本也即将上线，标准定价为每百万输入 token 5 美元、每百万输出 token 30 美元；GPT-5.5 Pro API 定价分别为 30 美元和 180 美元。

item.title: 把员工变成 skill 后，Meta 又盯上了他们的鼠标和键盘
item.guid: 把员工变成-skill-后，Meta-又盯上了他们的鼠标和键盘
item.description:
According to CNBC, Meta is using an internal tracking tool called Model Capability Initiative (MCI) to record employees' keyboard strokes and mouse clicks on hundreds of websites and applications like Google, LinkedIn, and Wikipedia, as a data source for training AI models. 据 CNBC 报道，Meta 正在通过一款名为 Model Capability Initiative（MCI，模型能力计划）的内部追踪工具，记录员工在 Google、LinkedIn、Wikipedia 等数百个网站和应用上的键盘敲击与鼠标点击，作为训练 AI 模型的数据来源。

An internal memo from members of Meta's Superintelligence Lab (MSL) shows that MCI's monitoring scope also covers third-party platforms such as GitHub, Slack, and Atlassian, with Meta's own Threads and Manus also on the list; earlier versions of the list included OpenAI's ChatGPT and Anthropic's Claude. Meta 超级智能实验室（MSL）成员发出的内部备忘录显示，MCI 的监控范围还涵盖 GitHub、Slack 以及 Atlassian 等第三方平台，Meta 自家的 Threads 和 Manus 也在名单之列，清单早期版本曾包含 OpenAI 的 ChatGPT 和 Anthropic 的 Claude。

A Meta spokesperson confirmed the project to the media, responding that building agents to help people complete daily tasks on computers requires real human usage examples, "such as mouse movements, button clicks, and dropdown menu operations," and emphasized that the system has protective measures in place for sensitive content, and data will not be used for other purposes. Meta 发言人向媒体证实了该项目，回应称构建帮助人们用电脑完成日常任务的智能体需要真实的人类使用范例，「比如鼠标移动、按钮点击和下拉菜单操作」，并强调系统已设置保护敏感内容的防护措施，数据不会用于其他用途。

MSL further explained in the memo that to "teach models to use computers," Meta needs "large and unbiased" datasets, and the new tool can only see what is displayed on employees' screens, "it will not read files or attachments," and suggested that "employees who still have concerns can control what is displayed on their screens by not handling private matters on their work computers." MSL 在备忘录中进一步解释，为「教会模型使用电脑」，Meta 需要「庞大且无偏见」的数据集，新工具仅能看到员工屏幕上显示的内容，「不会读取文件或附件」，并建议「仍有顾虑的员工可以通过不在工作电脑上处理私人事务来控制屏幕显示内容」。

However, multiple Meta employees described the project as "dystopian" in internal messages, fearing that MCI could expose user passwords, new product development details, and personal information such as employees' immigration status, health conditions, and family members. According to Business Insider, the tracking program does not offer employees an opt-out option. 然而，多名 Meta 员工在内部消息中将该项目形容为「反乌托邦」，担忧 MCI 会暴露用户密码、新产品研发细节，以及员工的移民身份、健康状况和家庭成员等个人信息。而据《商业内幕》报道，该追踪计划并未向员工提供退出选项。

item.title: 库克谈任期内「首个重大错误」：苹果地图翻车，Apple Watch 封神
item.guid: 库克谈任期内「首个重大错误」：苹果地图翻车，Apple-Watch-封神
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, more details have been released from Apple CEO Tim Cook's recent speech at an all-hands meeting. 据彭博社报道，苹果 CEO Tim Cook 日前在全员大会上的讲话有更多细节释出。

He reflected on the successes and failures of his nearly 15-year tenure as CEO, calling the rushed launch of Apple Maps in 2012 his "first truly big mistake," while listing the Apple Watch as his proudest achievement. 他回顾了自己近 15 年 CEO 任期内的得失，将 2012 年苹果地图的仓促上线称为「首个真正的大错误」，同时将 Apple Watch 列为自己最引以为豪的成就。

Cook stated at the conference that Apple Maps was "not fully mature" at the time, and the team mistakenly believed the product was ready because testing was primarily focused on local scenarios, and it was launched to the market without adequate preparation. 库克在大会上表示，苹果地图当时「还没有完全成熟」，团队误以为产品已准备就绪，原因在于测试内容主要集中于本地相关场景，并未做好充分准备便将其推向市场。

Apple Maps was officially released with iOS 6 in 2012, aiming to replace Google Maps, which had been a long-standing partner. However, it drew widespread criticism due to numerous functional flaws—incorrect route guidance, wrongly marked landmarks, town location deviations, and even cloud cover appearing in 3D street view maps were successively exposed, becoming a landmark "flop" event in the tech industry that year. 苹果地图于 2012 年随 iOS 6 正式发布，旨在取代此前合作多年的 Google 地图，却因大量功能缺陷引发广泛批评——错误的路线指引、标注有误的地标、城镇位置偏差乃至 3D 实景地图出现云层遮挡等问题接连曝出，成为当年科技圈的标志性翻车事件。

Cook admitted that his list of mistakes was "surprisingly long," but he also pointed out that Apple has largely avoided the frequent large-scale product recalls and cancellations seen in other consumer electronics companies over the past 15 years, and the Apple Maps blunder "ultimately became a valuable experience." 库克坦言，自己所犯的错误清单「长得惊人」，但他也指出，苹果在过去 15 年间基本上避开了其他消费电子公司频繁出现的大规模产品召回与取消事件，苹果地图的失误「最终成为了一次宝贵的经验」。

When asked about his proudest moment, Cook mentioned the Apple Watch. He said he was "deeply moved" the first time he received a letter from a user stating that the Apple Watch had saved their life. 在被问及最自豪的时刻时，库克提到了 Apple Watch。他表示，第一次收到用户来信称 Apple Watch 挽救了其生命时，自己「深受触动」。

item.title: Google 发布第八代 TPU：博通做训练，联发科做推理
item.guid: Google-发布第八代-TPU：博通做训练，联发科做推理
item.description:
On Wednesday local time, Google officially released its eighth-generation TPU at the annual Google Cloud Next conference. 当地时间周三，Google 在 Google Cloud Next 年度大会上，正式发布了第八代 TPU。

Notably, Google has split the TPU into two this time, introducing the TPU 8t optimized for training and the TPU 8i designed for inference. This marks the first time in Google's history that two types of workloads have been separated into independent chips. 值得一提的是，Google 此次将 TPU 一拆为二，推出专为训练优化的 TPU 8t 与专为推理设计的 TPU 8i，这也是谷歌历史上首次将两类工作负载拆分至独立芯片。

TPU 8t (training chip, Google x Broadcom co-designed) TPU 8t （训练芯片，谷歌 x 博通联合设计）

    Single chip specifications: 216 GB HBM, 6.5 TB/s memory bandwidth, 128 MB on-chip SRAM, up to 12.6 petaFLOPS FP4 computing power;

    A single Pod can interconnect up to 9600 chips, equipped with 2 PB shared HBM, with an overall computing power of 121 exaflops (FP4), an increase of approximately 3 times compared to the previous generation Ironwood, and a 2.8 times performance improvement at the same price;

    With OCS optical circuit switching and Virgo network, a single cluster can scale to over a million chips; the Managed Lustre storage system provides 10 TB/s aggregate throughput; and the effective computing time (goodput) reaches 97%.

TPU 8i (inference chip, co-designed by Google x MediaTek) TPU 8i （推理芯片，谷歌 x 联发科联合设计）

    Single chip specifications: 288 GB HBM, 8.6 TB/s memory bandwidth, 384 MB on-chip SRAM (3 times that of the previous generation), 10.1 petaFLOPS FP4 computing power;

    A single Pod expands to 1152 chips, providing 11.6 exaflops FP8 computing power, with an 80% performance increase compared to Ironwood at the same price, and a 117% increase in performance per watt;

    Adopting Boardfly network topology, the maximum number of inter-chip communication hops is compressed from 16 to 7; the Collective Acceleration Engine (CAE) reduces collective communication latency by five times, which is particularly critical for MoE architecture models.

Both chips adopt TSMC's 2nm process, are equipped with Google's self-developed Arm-architecture Axion CPU, completely moving away from x86, and are supported by fourth-generation liquid cooling technology for heat dissipation. They are planned to officially launch on Google Cloud Platform later this year, with full mass production targeted for the end of next year, supporting mainstream frameworks such as JAX, PyTorch, Keras, and vLLM. 两款芯片均采用台积电 2nm 制程，搭载谷歌自研 Arm 架构 Axion CPU，彻底告别 x86，并由第四代液冷技术提供散热支持，计划于今年晚些时候在 Google Cloud Platform 正式上线，完整量产目标定于明年底，支持 JAX、PyTorch、Keras 及 vLLM 等主流框架。

item.title: 宇树科技给机器人装上了轮子，还能前空翻
item.guid: 宇树科技给机器人装上了轮子，还能前空翻
item.description:
Unitree Robotics yesterday released its latest video, showcasing the newest capabilities of its wheeled-legged humanoid robot. The video shows the humanoid robot smoothly performing actions such as ice skating and rollerblading, as well as executing difficult maneuvers like 360-degree turns, single-foot spins, and front flips. 宇树科技昨日发布最新视频，展示了轮足人形机器人的最新能力。视频画面显示，该人形机器人可流畅完成滑冰、轮滑等动作，并实现 360 度转身、单足转圈、前空翻等高难度动作。

Unitree Robotics stated in the video, "Humanoid robots are the most ideal general-purpose robots (adaptable to general AI and human data), they can have no wheels, or they can have wheels, as desired." 宇树科技在视频中表示，「人形机器人是最理想的通用机器人（适配通用 AI 和人类数据），可以没有轮子，也可以有轮子，随意。」

item.title: 曝微软曾考虑收购 Cursor
item.guid: 曝微软曾考虑收购-Cursor
item.description:
According to CNBC, before SpaceX announced its acquisition of AI programming tool Cursor for $60 billion, Microsoft had discussed acquiring the company but ultimately did not make a formal offer. 据 CNBC 报道，SpaceX 宣布以 600 亿美元收购 AI 编程工具 Cursor 之前，微软曾就收购该公司进行过探讨，但最终未提出正式报价。

Previously, venture capital firms had already lined up financing for Cursor at a valuation of $50 billion. Insiders said that the SpaceX deal was reached later, catching investors who were already in line off guard, and that SpaceX had begun providing computing resources to Cursor weeks before announcing the acquisition. 此前，有风险投资机构已就 Cursor 500 亿美元的估值排好融资队列。知情人士称，SpaceX 协议达成时间较晚，令原本排队等候的投资者措手不及，且 SpaceX 在宣布收购前数周已开始向 Cursor 提供算力资源。

Microsoft is primarily promoting GitHub Copilot in the AI programming sector, with paid subscribers reaching 4.7 million. However, the current market is dominated by Cursor, Anthropic, and OpenAI, with Microsoft playing more of a role as an investor and cloud service provider. Microsoft's stock price has fallen by 10% year-to-date. 微软在 AI 编程赛道主推 GitHub Copilot，付费订阅用户已达 470 万。但目前该市场由 Cursor、Anthropic 与 OpenAI 主导，微软更多扮演投资者与云服务提供商角色。微软今年股价已累计下跌 10%。

item.title: 俞敏洪南极行将邀 10 名会员，明年 2 月启程
item.guid: 俞敏洪南极行将邀-10-名会员，明年-2-月启程
item.description:
Recently, Yu Minhong, founder of New Oriental, posted a video on social media, announcing an invitation to 10 Dongfang Zhenxuan members to travel to Antarctica together. 日前，新东方创始人俞敏洪在社交平台发布视频，宣布邀请 10 名东方甄选会员共赴南极。

The spots are allocated as follows: 9 members will be selected from users participating in the "buy 2 years, get 2 years free" renewal activity, and 1 member will be selected from long-term members who have renewed for 3 years. Applicants must be eligible members aged 18 to 70. The event team will conduct a comprehensive selection through phone interviews, considering membership qualifications, health status, and itinerary suitability. 名额分配为 9 名从「买 2 年送 2 年」续费活动用户中选出，1 名从续费 3 年的老会员中产生。报名者需为 18 至 70 岁的符合条件会员，活动组将结合会员资格、健康情况及行程适配度通过电话回访进行综合选拔。

The itinerary is tentatively scheduled to depart on February 4th next year and return to China on February 21st, totaling 18 days. The gathering city will be chosen from Beijing, Shanghai, or Guangzhou. Dongfang Zhenxuan will cover round-trip airfare, sightseeing fees, and cruise fares, but not Argentine visa fees. Guests will accompany the trip. 行程暂定明年 2 月 4 日出发，2 月 21 日返回中国，共计 18 天，集合城市拟在北京、上海、广州中选择。东方甄选承担往返机票、观光费及船费，不承担阿根廷签证费用，行程中将有嘉宾同行。

item.title: 曝美团副总裁夏华夏已离职，执掌无人车与 AI 业务逾十年
item.guid: 曝美团副总裁夏华夏已离职，执掌无人车与-AI-业务逾十年
item.description:
According to Red Star News, Xia Huaxia, Meituan's Vice President and Chief Scientist, has officially resigned from Meituan. He previously served as the General Manager of Meituan's autonomous vehicle business unit, reporting directly to Meituan founder Wang Xing. 据红星新闻报道，美团副总裁、首席科学家夏华夏已正式从美团离职，其此前担任美团无人车业务部总经理，直接向美团创始人王兴汇报。

Xia Huaxia was admitted to the Department of Computer Science at Tsinghua University in 1993 as the top science scorer in Shandong Province's college entrance examination, and later obtained his Ph.D. from the University of California, San Diego, USA. 夏华夏于 1993 年以山东省高考理科第一名的成绩考入清华大学计算机系，后赴美国加州大学圣迭戈分校取得博士学位。

In January 2020, Meituan integrated its internal AI-related businesses and officially established the Meituan AI Platform as a first-level organizational platform, led by Xia Huaxia. Subsequently, he was promoted to Vice President and Chief Scientist of Meituan, fully responsible for the research, development, and operation of the entire autonomous vehicle chain. 2020 年 1 月，美团整合内部 AI 相关业务，正式成立美团 AI 平台作为一级平台组织，由夏华夏领导。此后，他晋升为美团副总裁、首席科学家，全面负责无人车全链条研发与运营工作。

item.title: SK 海力士利润暴涨五倍
item.guid: SK-海力士利润暴涨五倍
item.description:
According to CNBC, SK Hynix yesterday released its Q1 2026 financial report, with revenue of 52.58 trillion Korean won (approximately $35.55 billion), nearly doubling year-on-year and exceeding 50 trillion Korean won for the first time; operating profit reached 37.61 trillion Korean won, a year-on-year increase of approximately five times , with the operating profit margin hitting a record high of 72%. 据 CNBC 报道，海力士昨日公布 2026 年第一季度财报，营收 52.58 万亿韩元（约合 355.5 亿美元），同比增长近两倍，首次突破 50 万亿韩元；营业利润 37.61 万亿韩元， 同比增长约五倍 ，营业利润率创历史新高至 72%。

Performance growth is primarily driven by the dual factors of AI demand and rising memory prices. SK Hynix is a core supplier of NVIDIA's AI processors, currently holding the top position in the global HBM market with a 57% market share. 业绩增长主要受 AI 需求与内存价格上涨双重驱动。海力士是英伟达 AI 处理器的核心供应商，目前以 57% 的市占率稳居全球 HBM 市场首位。

SK Hynix plans to provide samples of its seventh-generation HBM4E in the second half of this year and begin mass production next year. Regarding capacity, SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won predicted in March this year that the global wafer shortage would continue until 2030, and SK Hynix simultaneously announced an investment of 19 trillion Korean Won to build a new factory in Korea. 海力士计划今年下半年提供第七代 HBM4E 样品，明年启动量产。产能方面，SK 集团董事长崔泰源今年 3 月预计全球晶圆短缺将持续至 2030 年，海力士同步宣布在韩国投资 19 万亿韩元新建工厂。

item.title: 西山居游戏辟谣「解散」传言：将依法追究恶意造谣
item.guid: 西山居游戏辟谣「解散」传言：将依法追究恶意造谣
item.description:
Recently, a batch of fabricated screenshots, falsely published in the name of media outlets, have been circulating online, claiming that Xishanju Games will be disbanded and sold to NetEase on "June 31st". 近日，网络流传一批假冒媒体名义发布的伪造截图，内容称西山居游戏将于「6 月 31 日」解散并出售给网易。

Yesterday, Xishanju's official Weibo account issued a "Solemn Statement," denying recent online rumors of "dissolution" or "sale." The official statement clearly indicated that "Xishanju has no situation of so-called 'dissolution' or 'sale,' daily operations are all normal, and various R&D and publishing plans are steadily progressing." 昨天，西山居官方微博账号发布《严正声明》，否认近期网络流传的「解散」或「出售」传言。官方明确表示「西山居不存在所谓『解散』或『出售』的情况，日常经营一切正常，各项研发与发行计划稳步推进」。

Xishanju emphasized that the aforementioned rumor-mongering behavior has severely damaged the company's legitimate rights and interests, and the company will pursue legal responsibility against those who maliciously spread and create rumors. 西山居强调，上述造谣行为已严重损害公司合法权益，公司将依法追究恶意造谣、传谣主体的法律责任。

item.title: IPO 前夜裁员逾百人，曝智驾龙头 Momenta 感知算法团队「团灭」
item.guid: IPO-前夜裁员逾百人，曝智驾龙头-Momenta-感知算法团队「团灭」
item.description:
According to "Next-Generation Car Research Institute," autonomous driving leader Momenta is undergoing a large-scale personnel adjustment internally. 据《次世代车研所》报道，智驾龙头 Momenta 内部正进行一轮大规模人员调整。

It is reported that this round of layoffs primarily affects the perception algorithm department and the data platform department. The perception algorithm department is said to have seen 137 employees leave, mostly from technical positions, and its team leader was reportedly poached by a competitor with triple salary. 据悉，此次裁员重点波及感知算法部门与数据平台部，其中感知算法部门据称有 137 名员工离职，大多数为技术岗位，该团队负责人亦被曝以三倍薪资被竞争对手挖走。

In response, an insider who has had deep contact with Momenta's management and technical personnel confirmed: "Traditional perception has been cut, but end-to-end algorithms have not." The source revealed that since last summer, Momenta has begun to strengthen its "reinforcement learning world model" layout while simultaneously reducing investment in traditional perception directions. 对此，一位深度接触过 Momenta 管理及技术人员的知情者人士证实称：「传统感知裁了，但端到端算法没裁。」该人士透露，去年夏天起，Momenta 内部已开始加强「强化学习世界模型」布局，同步弱化对传统感知方向的投入。

Momenta recently confidentially submitted a listing application to the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, officially initiating its IPO process. Momenta 近期向香港交易所秘密递交上市申请，正式启动 IPO 流程。

Insiders revealed that prior to this IPO, Momenta completed a Pre-IPO funding round at a valuation of $6 billion, securing approximately $500 million in total investment from institutions such as UAE Stone Venture, Gaorong Capital, and Gaocheng Capital. The market expects its IPO valuation to potentially exceed 100 billion yuan, with a listing completed within this year. 知情人士透露，此次 IPO 前，Momenta 已以 60 亿美元估值完成 Pre-IPO 轮融资，获得阿联酋磊石资本（Stone Venture）、高榕资本、高成资本等机构合计约 5 亿美元投资。市场预计其 IPO 估值有望突破千亿元，并于今年内完成挂牌。

item.title: 脑机接口收费标准出炉
item.guid: 脑机接口收费标准出炉
item.description:
According to Yicai, the National Healthcare Security Administration announced yesterday that most provinces in China have now set government-guided prices for brain-computer interface-related services. The price for invasive brain-computer interface implantation is concentrated between 6,000 and 6,600 yuan per procedure, while the price for non-invasive brain-computer interface adaptation is around 960 yuan. 据第一财经报道，国家医保局昨日发布消息，目前我国多数省份已为脑机接口相关价格项目制定政府指导价，其中侵入式脑机接口置入费价格集中在 6000 至 6600 元/次，非侵入式脑机接口适配费价格集中在 960 元左右。

A month prior, China approved the world's first invasive brain-computer interface medical device product, which has been included in Shanghai's medical insurance catalog for medical consumables. 此前一个月，我国批准了全球首个侵入式脑机接口医疗器械产品，该产品已被纳入上海市医保医用耗材目录。

Shanghai brain-computer interface company NeuroXess also announced yesterday the progress of its second clinical brain-computer interface implantation study. A high-level paraplegic patient, after receiving a brain-computer interface device implant, achieved autonomous eating and was able to hold a pen and create drawings through a brain-controlled exoskeleton. 上海脑机接口公司脑虎科技昨日也公布了第二例脑机接口临床植入研究进展。一位高位截瘫患者在接受脑机接口设备植入后，实现了自主进食，并能通过脑控外骨骼握笔进行绘画创作。

Data shows that one month after surgery, the patient was able to achieve precise and active grasping with the affected hand through thought control, completing high-precision movements such as writing and drawing. From signal acquisition to terminal execution, the device's end-to-end latency is less than 50 milliseconds, reaching a leading level in international implantable brain-computer interface latency control. 数据显示，该患者术后 1 个月已可通过意念控制实现患侧手部精准主动抓握，完成书写、绘画等高精度动作。从信号采集到终端执行，设备全链路延时低于 50 毫秒，达到国际植入式脑机接口延时控制的领先水平。

item.title: 抖音治理 AI 侵权：累计下架视频超 53.8 万条
item.guid: 抖音治理-AI-侵权：累计下架视频超-53.8-万条
item.description:
Douyin yesterday released the "Announcement on the Governance of AI-Generated Inappropriate Content and Infringement of Others' Rights," disclosing the platform's special governance achievements in the field of AI infringement since the beginning of this year. 抖音昨日发布《关于 AI 生成不当内容及侵犯他人权益的治理公告》，披露了平台今年以来在 AI 侵权领域的专项治理成效。

Since the beginning of this year, Douyin has continuously strengthened its technical identification capabilities for AI content. The platform has cumulatively removed over 538,000 AI infringement videos and penalized more than 4,000 violating accounts; it has also dealt with over 30,000 pieces of inappropriate content that misled or induced middle-aged and elderly users to interact using "AI domineering CEO" images, involving over 1,300 accounts.

According to the announcement, the platform currently focuses on addressing four types of AI infringement scenarios: 根据公告，平台当前重点处置四类 AI 侵权场景：

    Using face-swapping and face synthesis technology to create prank, defaming, or false content, infringing upon others' portrait rights and reputation rights;

    Unauthorized cloning of others' voices for live streaming e-commerce or short video dubbing, leading to public misleading;

    Impersonating others to gain trending traffic or conducting fraudulent traffic diversion;

    Infringing live-streaming activities such as forging celebrity recommendation videos and AI-generated product promotional images.

item.title: T3 出行赴港上市
item.guid: T3-出行赴港上市
item.description:
According to reports from "STAR Market Daily", Nanjing Linghang Technology Co., Ltd. (T3 Mobility) has submitted its listing application to the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. 据《科创板日报》报道，南京领行科技股份有限公司（T3 出行）已向港交所提交上市申请书。

T3 Mobility was jointly founded by China FAW, Dongfeng Motor Group, Changan Automobile, Tencent, and Alibaba. It is China's third-largest smart mobility platform, with ride-hailing services covering 194 cities nationwide and a cumulative registered user base of 235 million. T3 出行由中国一汽、东风汽车集团、长安汽车、腾讯、阿里巴巴共同发起成立，是中国第三大智慧出行平台，网约车服务覆盖全国 194 个城市，累计注册用户达 2.35 亿人。

In terms of financial performance, T3 Mobility turned profitable last year, with full-year GTV increasing by 10.5% year-on-year to 18.9 billion yuan, and a gross profit margin of 13%. It ranks second among large smart mobility platforms in China and is the fastest company to achieve profitability in the industry. 在财务表现方面，T3 出行于去年实现净利润转正，全年 GTV 同比增长 10.5% 至 189 亿元，毛利率达 13%，在中国大型智慧出行平台中排名第二，也是该行业中最快实现盈利的企业。

item.title: 岚图汽车董事长：经历 L3 是必要的
item.guid: 岚图汽车董事长：经历-L3-是必要的
item.description:
According to reports from Yicai, Lu Fang, Chairman of Voyah Automobile, recently stated clearly at a media briefing that the L3 level stage is indispensable in the process of moving towards higher-level intelligent driving capabilities. 据第一财经报道，岚图汽车董事长卢放日前在媒体沟通会上明确表态，走向更高阶智能驾驶能力的过程中，L3 级别阶段是不可跳过的。

I personally firmly believe that to achieve higher-level intelligent driving capabilities, experiencing the L3 level stage is necessary. I think the evolution of things requires a transitional phase, which is to be responsible for the future operation of society and for future traffic safety; thus, experiencing the L3 level is essential.

item.title: 💡 Augment Code 实测：好的 AGENTS.md 相当于模型升级一档，差的不如没有
item.guid: 💡-Augment-Code-实测：好的-AGENTS.md-相当于模型升级一档，差的不如没有
item.description:
AI programming tool company Augment Code yesterday released an internal study: extracting dozens of AGENTS.md files from its own codebase to measure their actual impact on the output quality of coding AI agents. AI 编程工具公司 Augment Code 昨日公布了一项内部研究：从自家代码库中抽取数十份 AGENTS.md，测量其对编码 AI 智能体产出质量的实际影响。

The results show that well-written AGENTS.md files provide an improvement equivalent to upgrading a model from Haiku to Opus, while poorly written ones are worse than not writing them at all. 结果显示，写得好的 AGENTS.md 带来的提升相当于模型从 Haiku 升级到 Opus，写得差的则不如完全不写。

The study found that effective AGENTS.md files should keep the main file between 100 and 150 lines, complemented by a few focused reference documents, which can lead to a 10% to 15% overall quality improvement in medium-sized modules. 研究发现，有效的 AGENTS.md 应将主文件控制在 100 到 150 行，配合少量聚焦的参考文档，在中等规模的模块中可带来 10% 到 15% 的全面质量提升。

The two most effective approaches are to write operational procedures as numbered steps and use decision tables to help AI agents lock down solutions in advance; when writing prohibitions, alternative solutions must be provided simultaneously, otherwise, the agent will fall into a dilemma of repeated exploration and delayed action. 效果最显著的两种做法，是将操作流程写成编号步骤、用决策表帮助 AI 智能体提前锁定方案；写禁令时必须同时给出替代方案，否则智能体会陷入反复探索、迟迟不动手的困境。

The most common reason for failure is excessive document accumulation. Once the agent is attracted by a large number of architectural documents, its output quality deteriorates after loading a massive amount of context. 而最常见的失败原因是文档堆积过多。一旦智能体被大量架构文档吸引，加载海量上下文后产出反而变差。

The study also pointed out that AGENTS.md is the only document location that agents will 100% automatically read. Documents stored in the _docs/ directory and not referenced have a discovery probability of less than 10%. 研究还指出，AGENTS.md 是智能体 100% 会自动读取的唯一文档位置，存放在 _docs/ 目录下且未被引用的文档，被发现的概率不足 10%。

item.title: 1999 元起，大疆发布全新 DJI Lito 系列无人机
item.guid: 1999-元起，大疆发布全新-DJI-Lito-系列无人机
item.description:
Yesterday, DJI officially released its new DJI Lito series drones, introducing two models, Lito X1 and Lito 1, targeting the entry-level aerial photography market. First, let's look at the prices: 昨天，大疆正式发布全新 DJI Lito 系列无人机，推出 Lito X1 与 Lito 1 两款机型，定位入门级航拍市场，先看价格：

The Lito 1 standalone unit is priced at 1999 yuan, and the Fly More Combo (DJI RC-N3) is 2799 yuan; the Lito X1 standalone unit is 2488 yuan, the Fly More Combo (DJI RC-N3) is 3388 yuan, the Fly More Combo (DJI RC 2) is 3988 yuan, and the Long-Endurance Fly More Combo (DJI RC 2) is 4488 yuan.

Both models feature a foldable body weighing less than 249 grams, can be stored in a carry bag when folded, and can legally take off in most countries and regions worldwide; both come standard with omnidirectional obstacle avoidance and omnidirectional intelligent tracking, are equipped with DJI O4 image transmission, support 1080p/60fps high-definition video transmission, include a standard 36-minute endurance battery, and can achieve up to 52 minutes with the long-endurance version. 两款机型均采用轻于 249 克的折叠机身，折叠后可装入随身袋，在全球大部分国家和地区均可合规起飞；全系标配全向避障与全向智能跟随，搭载 DJI O4 图传，支持 1080p/60fps 高清画面传输，标配 36 分钟续航电池，换用长续航版本可达 52 分钟。

Lito X1 Lito X1

    Built-in omnidirectional visual perception system, equipped with front and rear infrared sensing and forward-looking LiDAR, with dual systems working collaboratively for more precise obstacle detection;

    Equipped with a 1/1.3-inch sensor, f/1.7 large aperture, supporting up to 8K resolution photos, 4K/60fps HDR video (14-stop dynamic range), 4K/100fps slow motion, 10-Bit D-Log M format, and 2.7K vertical recording, with 42GB of built-in storage.

Lito 1 Lito 1

    Possesses omnidirectional environmental perception capabilities, allowing for intelligent braking or avoidance when encountering obstacles;

    Supports up to 8K resolution photos and 4K/60fps videos, meeting daily aerial photography needs.

item.title: 字节跳动发布 Seed3D 2.0
item.guid: 字节跳动发布-Seed3D-2.0
item.description:
ByteDance's Seed team officially released the new generation 3D generative large model Seed3D 2.0 yesterday. In human blind evaluations against six mainstream models, Seed3D 2.0 achieved SOTA in both core metrics of geometry and texture, with user preference for texture generation tasks exceeding 69%. 字节跳动 Seed 团队昨日正式发布新一代 3D 生成大模型 Seed3D 2.0，在与六个主流模型的人类盲评对比中，Seed3D 2.0 在几何与纹理两项核心指标上均取得 SOTA，纹理生成任务的用户偏好率超过 69%。

    Supports component-level generation, allowing Seed3D-PartSeg and Seed3D-PartDiT modules to automatically disassemble a chair into a seat, backrest, and base, or a robot by its limbs, and complete the full shape of each component;

    Articulated modeling: utilizes VLM to identify rotatable or fixed joint types, simulates motion range with image-to-video models, and finally outputs in URDF standard format, which can be directly imported into physics simulation engines like Isaac Sim;

    Supports text, multi-view images, or videos as input, with the model automatically inferring spatial layouts and generating objects one by one, combining them into a complete interactive simulation scene.

item.title: 腾讯混元开源 Hy3 preview，推理效率提升 40%
item.guid: 腾讯混元开源-Hy3-preview，推理效率提升-40%
item.description:
Yesterday, Tencent Hunyuan released and open-sourced the Hy3 preview language model, with a total of 295B parameters and 21B active parameters. Yao Shunyu, Tencent's Chief AI Scientist, positioned it as "the first step in the reconstruction of the Hunyuan large model." 昨天，腾讯混元发布并开源了 Hy3 preview 语言模型，总参数 295B，激活参数 21B。腾讯首席 AI 科学家姚顺雨将其定位为「混元大模型重建的第一步」。

    For complex reasoning, Hy3 preview achieved the highest score among domestic open-source models in Tsinghua University's Qiu Zhen College Mathematics Doctoral Entrance Exam (Spring 2026);

    Code and AI agents are the most significantly improved areas, achieving competitive results in mainstream benchmarks such as SWE-Bench Verified and BrowseComp;

    In internal product tests, CodeBuddy and WorkBuddy's first token latency decreased by 54%, end-to-end duration decreased by 47%, and they have stably driven complex AI agent workflows up to 495 steps; Tencent Docs AI PPT generation success rate increased by 20%, and time consumption decreased by 20%.

In terms of cost, overall inference efficiency has increased by 40%. On the Tencent Cloud platform TokenHub, input prices start from 1.2 yuan / million tokens, output prices start from 4 yuan / million tokens, and the personal plan starts from 28 yuan / month. 成本方面，整体推理效率提升 40%。在腾讯云平台 TokenHub 上，输入价格最低 1.2 元 / 百万 tokens，输出最低 4 元 / 百万 tokens，个人版套餐最低 28 元 / 月。

item.title: 特斯拉第三代人形机器人或年中亮相，7-8 月正式投产
item.guid: 特斯拉第三代人形机器人或年中亮相，7-8-月正式投产
item.description:
Yesterday, Tesla officially announced that its third-generation humanoid robot is expected to debut in mid-year, with formal production starting in July-August this year. Product testing is currently progressing steadily, and external application scenarios are anticipated next year. Tesla also stated that the humanoid robot will become its "largest product by production scale ever." 昨天，特斯拉官方发文称，旗下第三代人形机器人预计年中亮相，将于今年 7-8 月启动正式投产，产品测试目前稳步推进，预计明年投入外部场景应用。特斯拉同时表示，人形机器人将成为其「有史以来生产规模最大的产品」。

On January 29 this year, when Tesla released its Q4 2025 and full-year financial report, it stated that the third-generation humanoid robot would be released in the first quarter of this year; in early February, Tesla's official Weibo also announced that the third-generation robot was "coming soon" and could learn new skills by observing human behavior. 今年 1 月 29 日，特斯拉在发布 2025 年第四季度及全年财报时曾表示，第三代人形机器人将于今年第一季度发布；2 月初，特斯拉官方微博也曾宣称第三代机器人「即将亮相」，并称其可通过观察人类行为学习新技能。

In terms of product planning, the third-generation version will be upgraded based on the 2.5 generation, including the latest hand design. The Model S/X production line at the Fremont factory will be converted into a humanoid robot production line, with a planned annual capacity of 1 million units. Concurrently, Tesla is preparing a second-generation production line for its Gigafactory Texas, with a long-term design annual capacity of 10 million units. 在产品规划上，第三代版本将在 2.5 代基础上升级，包含最新的手部设计。弗里蒙特工厂的 Model S/X 生产线届时将改造为人形机器人产线，规划年产能为 100 万台。与此同时，特斯拉正在为得州超级工厂筹备第二代生产线，长期设计年产能达 1000 万台。

item.title: 华为乾崑 ADS 5 正式发布：训练效率提升 10 倍，碰撞风险降低 50%
item.guid: 华为乾崑-ADS-5-正式发布：训练效率提升-10-倍，碰撞风险降低-50%
item.description:
Huawei held the Qiankun Technology Conference in Beijing yesterday, themed "Qiankun for Safety, Embrace a Better Future," officially releasing new-generation intelligent vehicle solutions such as Qiankun Intelligent Driving ADS 5 and HarmonySpace 6 cockpit. ADS 5 adopts the WEWA 2.0 architecture, positioned as an AI agent for autonomous driving: 华为昨日在北京举行乾崑技术大会，以「安全有乾崑 安心赴美好」为主题，正式发布乾崑智驾 ADS 5、鸿蒙座舱 HarmonySpace 6 等新一代智能汽车解决方案。ADS 5 采用 WEWA 2.0 架构，定位面向自动驾驶的 AI 智能体：

    The cloud-based world model for the first time introduces a "multi-agent game" mechanism, improving both training intensity and efficiency by 10 times;

    The vehicle-side world behavior model introduces safety risk field theory, reducing collision risk by 50%;

    The six-dimensional safety system adds "all-domain safety," which can send early warnings to nearby vehicles via the cloud in dangerous situations;

    The driver incapacitation assistance function is upgraded, capable of automatically guiding an incapacitated driver to the nearest safe area.

Jin Yuzhi, CEO of Huawei's Intelligent Automotive Solution BU, simultaneously released the industry's first Qiankun OS operating system for autonomous driving, which can reduce in-car signal latency by 30%. As of April 19, Qiankun Intelligent Driving ADS has accumulated over 10 billion kilometers in assisted driving mileage, and an additional 18 billion yuan is expected to be invested in R&D this year. 华为智能汽车解决方案 BU CEO 靳玉志同步发布行业首个面向自动驾驶的乾崑 OS 操作系统，可降低车内信号 30% 时延。截至 4 月 19 日，乾崑智驾 ADS 累计辅助驾驶里程已突破 100 亿公里，今年预计再投入 180 亿元用于研发。

Regarding the cockpit, HarmonySpace 6 released the AMS in-cabin AI multimodal perception system, which can monitor occupant vital signs and report rescue information in the event of an accident. The Xiaoyi intelligent agent has been upgraded to the MoLA 2.0 architecture, equipped with a trillion-parameter multimodal large model, becoming the industry's first full-scenario, cross-domain interactive cockpit AI intelligent agent. For audio-visual configuration, dual 17.2-inch 3.4K in-car dual screens and HUAWEI XSCENE LCoS in-car laser projection were simultaneously launched. 座舱方面，HarmonySpace 6 发布 AMS 舱内 AI 多模态感知系统，可监测乘员生命体征并在事故中上报救援信息。小艺智能体升级至 MoLA 2.0 架构，搭载千亿级参数多模态大模型，成为行业首个全场景跨域交互的座舱 AI 智能体。影音配置上，双 17.2 英寸 3.4K 车载双联屏与 HUAWEI XSCENE LCoS 车载激光投影同步首发。

item.title: Claude Code 上线深度代码审查功能 ultrareview
item.guid: Claude-Code-上线深度代码审查功能-ultrareview
item.description:
Recently, Anthropic launched a deep code review feature called 'ultrareview' for Claude Code, which is currently in a research preview phase. 近日，Anthropic 为 Claude Code 推出了名为「ultrareview」的深度代码审查功能，目前处于研究预览阶段。

This feature runs on the Claude Code Web infrastructure. After a user executes the /ultrareview command in the CLI, the system will launch a set of parallel review agents in a remote sandbox to perform a comprehensive bug scan of the current branch or Pull Request. 该功能基于 Claude Code Web 基础设施运行，用户在 CLI 中执行 /ultrareview 指令后，系统会在远程沙箱中启动一组并行的审查 Agent，对当前分支或 Pull Request 进行全面的 Bug 扫描。

Each review result is independently reproduced and verified, ultimately presenting real bugs, not style suggestions; multiple agents explore code changes in parallel, providing broader coverage; the entire review process runs entirely in the cloud, without occupying local resources. 每一条审查结果均经过独立复现与验证，最终呈现的是真实存在的 Bug，而非风格建议；多个 Agent 并行探索代码变更，覆盖面更广；整个审查过程完全在云端运行，不占用本地资源。

Regarding usage, when run without parameters, ultrareview will review the differences between the current branch and the default branch, including uncommitted and staged changes; if a PR number is passed (e.g., /ultrareview 1234), the corresponding Pull Request will be cloned directly from GitHub for review. 在使用方式上，不带参数运行时，ultrareview 会审查当前分支与默认分支之间的差异，包含未提交和已暂存的变更；若传入 PR 编号（如 /ultrareview 1234），则直接从 GitHub 克隆对应 Pull Request 进行审查。

In terms of pricing, Pro and Max subscribers each receive 3 free trial credits, valid until May 5th of this year, and these are one-time allocations that will not refresh. After the free credits are exhausted, each review will be billed as 'additional usage,' with costs typically ranging from $5 to $20, depending on the scale of code changes. 在定价方面，Pro 和 Max 订阅用户各获得 3 次免费试用额度，有效期截至今年 5 月 5 日，且为一次性配额、不会刷新。免费额度耗尽后，每次审查将按「额外用量」计费，费用通常在 5 至 20 美元之间，具体取决于代码变更规模。

item.title: 千问开放「AI 办事」能力，首家接入东航上线 AI 选座、值机服务
item.guid: 千问开放「AI-办事」能力，首家接入东航上线-AI-选座、值机服务
item.description:
Qianwen officially opened its 'AI Services' capability to the public yesterday, providing access channels for various social services, with China Eastern Airlines as its first partner. 千问昨日正式对外开放「AI 办事」能力，面向各类社会服务提供接入通道，首家合作伙伴为中国东方航空。

The two parties jointly launched a full-process AI direct ticketing service, allowing users to complete flight inquiries, ticket purchases, seat selection, and check-in operations using natural language within the Qianwen APP. Refund, change, and cancellation services are supported by China Eastern Airlines officially, and membership services will also be gradually integrated in the future. 双方联合推出全流程 AI 机票直连服务，用户可在千问 APP 内通过自然语言完成航班查询、购票、选座及值机等操作，退改签服务由东航官方提供支持，会员服务也将在未来陆续接入。

Qianwen and China Eastern Airlines plan to further expand their cooperation, covering itinerary management, check-in reminders, refund/change/cancellation assistance, and integration with ride-hailing, hotel, and other capabilities. Features such as proactive reminders to book travel vehicles before departure will also be launched successively. 千问与东航计划进一步拓展合作，涵盖行程管理、值机提醒、退改签协助，以及与打车、酒店等能力的整合，出发前主动提醒预约出行车辆等功能也将陆续上线。

item.title: 茶颜悦色深圳首店开业：排队 2 小时、代购炒至 100 元
item.guid: 茶颜悦色深圳首店开业：排队-2-小时、代购炒至-100-元
item.description:
According to Time Finance, Changsha's popular milk tea brand, Chayan Yuese, officially opened two stores yesterday at Shenzhen Bay MixC and Shenzhen MixC World. Both stores are located in the core area of Nanshan District, Shenzhen. Shenzhen is also the first tier-one city Chayan Yuese has entered. 据时代财经报道，长沙网红奶茶品牌茶颜悦色于昨天在深圳湾万象城与深圳万象天地的两家门店正式开业，两家门店均位于深圳南山区核心位置。深圳也是茶颜悦色进驻的首个一线城市。

The stores were exceptionally popular on their opening day. At 10 AM yesterday, multiple queuing areas at Chayan Yuese's Shenzhen Bay MixC store were already full, with waiting times starting at 2 hours; by 9 PM, the mini-program showed that orders placed at the store still required a wait of over 1.5 hours. 门店开业首日火爆异常。昨天上午 10 点，茶颜悦色深圳湾万象城店多个排队区已爆满，排队时间在 2 小时起；直至晚上 9 点，小程序显示该门店下单后仍需等待超过 1 个半小时。

Chayan Yuese requires customers to verify their order code in-store before drinks enter the production process. The new Shenzhen stores also set a rule of a maximum of 2 cups per person. The new stores currently do not offer delivery services, and due to the purchase limit, the original price of 18 yuan for a Youlan Latte was resold for 100 yuan per cup by scalpers. 茶颜悦色需消费者到店核销点单码后，饮品才进入制作流程，深圳新店还设置了每人限购 2 杯的规则。新店目前尚未开放外卖服务，受限购影响，原价 18 元的幽兰拿铁在代购处被炒至 100 元一杯。

A Chayan Yuese spokesperson revealed that regular stores are usually equipped with 3 to 4 staff members, 'Garden Party' store types with 8 to 9 staff members, while the two newly opened Shenzhen stores each have 50 employees. 茶颜悦色相关负责人透露，常规门店通常配备 3 至 4 名店员，「游园会」店型配备 8 至 9 名店员，而此次新开业的两家深圳门店每家配备了 50 名员工。

According to the official announcement, Chayan Yuese plans to open at least 10 stores in Shenzhen this year. Two stores, located at Shenzhen COCO Park and One Avenue, are currently in the preparation phase. The COCO Park store will open by the end of May, with the One Avenue store following closely. 官方公告显示，今年茶颜悦色将在深圳开至少 10 家门店，位于深圳 COCO Park 与壹方城的两家门店目前处于筹备阶段，其中 COCO Park 门店将于 5 月底开业，壹方城门店将紧跟其后。

item.title: Nike 前高管出任 lululemon 新 CEO
item.guid: Nike-前高管出任-lululemon-新-CEO
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, lululemon's board of directors unanimously approved the appointment of Heidi O’Neill as the company's new CEO yesterday. She will officially assume the role and join the board on September 8th this year. 据界面新闻报道，lululemon 董事会昨天一致批准任命 Heidi O’Neill 为公司新任 CEO，她将于今年 9 月 8 日正式就任并加入董事会。

Heidi O’Neill has over 25 years of experience at Nike, where she served as President of Consumer, Product & Brand before leaving. She led efforts to shorten product development cycles and improve launch efficiency, and currently also serves on the boards of companies such as Spotify and Hyatt Hotels. Heidi O’Neill 拥有逾 25 年 Nike 从业经历，离开 Nike 前担任消费者、产品与品牌总裁，主导缩短产品研发周期、提升上市效率，目前还兼任 Spotify、凯悦酒店等公司董事。

Heidi O’Neill stated that after taking office, she will accelerate product innovation, deepen brand cultural influence, and drive global market growth, with revitalizing North American performance as her top priority. Heidi O’Neill 表示，上任后将加速产品创新、深化品牌文化影响力并推动全球市场增长，重振北美业绩将是其首要课题。

Separately, according to The Beijing News, lululemon responded yesterday to the previous controversy regarding carcinogens detected in Texas, USA. The brand stated that sampling and testing results from domestic stores and warehouses showed no PFAS detected in any samples, and the supervisory spot check conclusions from domestic regulatory authorities are consistent with this. 另据《新京报》报道，lululemon 昨天对此前美国得州检出致癌物相关风波发表回应。品牌方表示，国内门店及仓储抽样送检结果显示所有样品均未检出 PFAS，国内监管部门的监督抽检结论与此一致。

item.title: 雀巢确认出售蓝瓶咖啡，瑞幸背后大钲资本接盘
item.guid: 雀巢确认出售蓝瓶咖啡，瑞幸背后大钲资本接盘
item.description:
Nestlé Group officially confirmed in its latest financial report yesterday that it has agreed to sell Blue Bottle Coffee to Centurium Capital. The transaction is expected to be completed in the first half of this year, subject to customary closing conditions. 雀巢集团昨日在最新财报中正式确认，已同意将蓝瓶咖啡（Blue Bottle Coffee）出售给大钲资本（Centurium Capital），交易预计于今年上半年完成，尚需满足惯常前提条件。

Centurium Capital was founded by Li Hui in 2017, manages over $7 billion, and led the restructuring of Luckin Coffee after it fell into crisis, becoming its controlling shareholder. 大钲资本由黎辉于 2017 年创立，管理规模逾 70 亿美元，曾在瑞幸咖啡陷入危机后主导其重组并成为控股股东。

Meanwhile, Nestlé's Q1 2026 financial report data shows that first-quarter sales were 21.317 billion Swiss francs, a year-on-year decrease of 5.7%; organic growth reached 3.5%, higher than the market expectation of 2.64%, with real internal growth (RIG) at 1.2% and pricing contributing 2.3%. 与此同时，雀巢 2026 年第一季度财报数据显示，一季度销售额为 213.17 亿瑞士法郎，同比下降 5.7%；有机增长率达 3.5%，高于市场预期的 2.64%，其中实际内部增长率（RIG）为 1.2%，定价贡献率为 2.3%。

The coffee business performed exceptionally well, achieving organic growth of 9.3%, with Nescafé seeing double-digit growth in various markets; the food and snack business grew organically by 4.2%, with the confectionery category performing brilliantly; e-commerce channels saw organic growth of 15.4%, increasing its share of the group's total sales to 21.5%. The only drag came from the infant formula category within the nutrition business. 咖啡业务表现突出，有机增长达 9.3%，旗下 Nescafé 在各市场实现双位数增长；食品与零食业务有机增长 4.2%，糖果品类表现亮眼；电商渠道有机增长 15.4%，占集团总销售额比重升至 21.5%。唯一拖累项来自营养品业务中的婴幼儿配方奶粉品类。

item.title: 华纳股东投票通过派拉蒙千亿收购
item.guid: 华纳股东投票通过派拉蒙千亿收购
item.description:
According to Deseret News, Warner Bros. Discovery held a shareholder meeting yesterday, where shareholders overwhelmingly approved Paramount's acquisition proposal of the company for approximately $111 billion, at $31 per share. This merger will integrate two major Hollywood studios, and CNN will also be incorporated under the new parent company. 据 Deseret News 报道，华纳兄弟探索昨日举行股东大会，股东以压倒性多数票通过了派拉蒙以约 1110 亿美元收购公司的交易方案，每股作价 31 美元。此次合并将整合好莱坞两大头部制片厂，CNN 也将随之并入新的母公司旗下。

The merged new company will own heavyweight IPs such as "SpongeBob SquarePants" and "Harry Potter," and will take over channel assets including TNT, Food Network, Cartoon Network, and Animal Planet. 合并后的新公司将坐拥《海绵宝宝》《哈利·波特》等重量级 IP，并将接管 TNT、Food Network、Cartoon Network、Animal Planet 等频道资产。

It is reported that David Ellison, son of Oracle founder Larry Ellison, will serve as the head of the merged company and plans to release a total of 30 films annually between the Paramount and Warner labels. 据悉，甲骨文（Oracle）创始人拉里·埃里森（Larry Ellison）之子大卫·埃里森（David Ellison）将出任合并后公司的负责人，并计划每年在派拉蒙与华纳两个厂牌之间合计发行 30 部影片。

Currently, the transaction still requires final approval from the U.S. Department of Justice and international regulatory bodies to be completed. 目前，该交易仍需获得美国司法部及国际监管机构的最终批准方可完成。

item.title: DCU 恐怖新片《泥面人》首曝预告
item.guid: DCU-恐怖新片《泥面人》首曝预告
item.description:
Yesterday, DC Films officially released the Chinese-subtitled teaser trailer for the new DCU thriller "Clayface" and simultaneously unveiled the official poster. The film is scheduled to be released in North America on October 23 this year. 昨天，DC 电影官方发布了 DCU 惊悚新片《泥面人》的中字先导预告片，并同步公开了正式海报。影片北美定档今年 10 月 23 日上映。

"Clayface" is adapted from Batman's classic villain "Clayface" in DC Comics. The film version takes a body horror route, telling the story of actor Matt Hagen who, after being attacked and disfigured, unexpectedly gains the ability to "transform" and becomes Clayface. 《泥面人》改编自 DC 漫画中蝙蝠侠的经典反派角色「泥脸」。电影版本走肉体恐怖（Body Horror）路线，讲述演员马特·哈根遭人袭击、面部毁损后意外获得「变形」能力，从此化身泥面人的故事。

item.title: 《小黄人大眼萌 3》确认引进
item.guid: 《小黄人大眼萌-3》确认引进
item.description:
According to blogger "Hollywood Watch," "Minions 3" ("Minions and the Great Monster") has been confirmed for import, with the specific release date yet to be determined. It is scheduled to be released in North America on July 1. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，《小黄人大眼萌 3》（《小黄人与大怪兽》）已确认引进，具体档期待定，北美定档 7 月 1 日上映。

The film will be set in 1920s Hollywood, telling the story of three new protagonist Minions venturing into the entertainment industry — they work as extras on set while harboring the dream of making a monster movie. The official positioning of this film is "a celebration of the birth of cinema." 影片将以 1920 年代好莱坞为背景，讲述三名全新主角小黄人闯荡演艺圈的故事 —— 它们在片场担任群演，同时怀揣着拍摄一部怪兽电影的梦想。官方将本片定位为「对电影诞生的歌颂」。
